name: @pi/anthropic-messages
description: Anthropic-messages protocol bridge for pi. Single-gate (Claude model on anthropic-messages): canonicalizes lowercase pi core tools (read/write/bash/grep → Read/Write/Bash/Grep), namespaces custom tools under mcp__pi__, rewrites the system prompt, and translates tool-call names back inbound with defensive _ide suffix stripping. True no-op for non-Claude anthropic-messages and for any non-anthropic-messages session.
